# Construction Capital

> UK property development finance brokers with 25+ years experience. We arrange development finance, bridging loans, mezzanine finance, equity & joint ventures, refurbishment finance, commercial mortgages, and development exit finance from 100+ specialist lenders.

## About

Construction Capital is a specialist property finance brokerage based in the UK. Founded by Matt Lenzie, we have over 25 years of experience arranging finance for property developers and investors. We have arranged over £500M in property finance across the full capital stack.

Our services include:
- Development Finance (from 6.5% p.a., up to 70% LTGDV)
- Mezzanine Finance (from 12% p.a., up to 90% LTGDV)
- Bridging Loans (from 0.55% p.m., up to 75% LTV)
- Equity & Joint Ventures (profit share from 40%, up to 100% of costs)
- Refurbishment Finance (from 0.65% p.m., up to 75% LTV)
- Commercial Mortgages (from 5.5% p.a., up to 75% LTV)
- Development Exit Finance (from 0.55% p.m., up to 75% LTV)

## Location Coverage

We arrange property finance across the UK including Greater London, Greater Manchester, West Midlands, West Yorkshire, Bristol, Edinburgh, and 130+ other towns and cities. Visit [our locations page](https://constructioncapital.co.uk/locations) for local market information.
